title: [LLVM][ConstantFolding] Add vector ConstantInt/FP support to ReadDataFromGlobal.
author: paulwalker-arm

tests.test_body:
declare i32 @memcmp(ptr, ptr, i64)

define i1 @memcmp_4bytes_one_unaligned_i8(ptr align 4 %x, ptr align 1 %y) {
  %lhsv = load i32, ptr %x, align 4
  %call = tail call i32 @memcmp(ptr %x, ptr %y, i64 4)
  %cmpeq0 = icmp eq i32 %call, 0
  ret i1 %cmpeq0
}
